'''nawafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oldbie|oldbie]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-w-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oldbie|oldbie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nawafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:næwæfæth|næwæfæth]] || [[word:næwæfæj|næwæfæj]] || [[word:næwæfæsh|næwæfæsh]] || [[word:næwæfæ|næwæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nawawafath|nawawafath]] || [[word:nawawafaj|nawawafaj]] || [[word:nawawafash|nawawafash]] || [[word:nawawafa|nawawafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nawafath|nawafath]] || [[word:nawafaj|nawafaj]] || [[word:nawafash|nawafash]] || [[word:nawafa|nawafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nawaffath|nawaffath]] || [[word:nawaffaj|nawaffaj]] || [[word:nawaffash|nawaffash]] || [[word:nawaffaf|nawaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nawafatha|nawafatha]] || [[word:nawafaja|nawafaja]] || [[word:nawafasha|nawafasha]] || [[word:nawafaka|nawafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nawafath|nawafath]] || [[word:nawafaj|nawafaj]] || [[word:nawafash|nawafash]] || [[word:nawafa|nawafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nawafathal|nawafathal]] || [[word:nawafajal|nawafajal]] || [[word:nawafashal|nawafashal]] || [[word:nawafakal|nawafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nawafathatha|nawafathatha]] || [[word:nawafajaja|nawafajaja]] || [[word:nawafashasha|nawafashasha]] || [[word:nawafaka|nawafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nawafathan|nawafathan]] || [[word:nawafajan|nawafajan]] || [[word:nawafashan|nawafashan]] || [[word:nawafakan|nawafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nawafathaoro|nawafathaoro]] || [[word:nawafajaoro|nawafajaoro]] || [[word:nawafashaoro|nawafashaoro]] || [[word:nawafakaoro|nawafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
